message: I've been picking through my emergency kit lately and realized I was missing some basics I actually use regularly—like a hand-crank radio and some of those chemical hand warmers. Turns out there's a solid government resource that walks through what actually makes sense to have on hand, without the overwhelming doom-and-gloom stuff. It's kind of nice to feel a little more ready without stressing about it. What's one thing you always keep stocked at home, just in case?
